name: ai-element-selector
description: Select elements in browser and generate AI prompts with source mapping.

commands.title: AI: Setup Source Mapping for Project

ai-element-selector.systemPrompt.default: You are a professional developer assistant.
ai-element-selector.systemPrompt.description: The base instruction for the AI (the header of the prompt).

ai-element-selector.taskPlaceholder.description: The text used for the user instruction placeholder.

ai-element-selector.snippetRange.description: Number of lines of code context to include before and after the target.

ai-element-selector.compactPrompt.description: Remove extra whitespace and headers for a direct, minimal prompt.

ai-element-selector.includeConstraints.description: Include the default instructions like 'Only modify code relevant to this element'.

ai-element-selector.customTemplate.markdownDescription: Use simple variables like `{{component}}`, `{{file}}`, `{{line}}`, `{{tag}}`, `{{text}}`, `{{snippet}}`, and `{{props}}` to define your own prompt layout. Leave blank to use the default formatting.

ai-element-selector.highlightColor.description: CSS color for the element selection box.

ai-element-selector.autoFocus.description: Automatically switch focus back to the editor after capturing an element.

ai-element-selector.modifierKey.description: The key to hold to temporarily disable selection (to click real buttons/links).

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
